feedback.text: I want customers to be protected from their games being rendered unplayable by the publisher, which can happen today, even though the game is bought without any explicit expiration date given. Could this please be included in the act? This has happened to several games, among them The Crew, published by Ubisoft. The game was made unplayable by Ubisoft in 2024, when servers were shut down. By then The Crew had shipped millions of copies, and buyers were only made aware of the upcoming shutdown three months in advance. Thank you.
